messages.content: Design a campus network for 3,500 users in a single large building with 5 floors, 2 server rooms, and plans to grow to 8,000 users in 3 years. What topology should I use?
My BGP neighbor between two iBGP routers is established but routes from the remote AS are not showing up in the routing table. The next-hop IP shows as unreachable. How do I fix this?
Compare HSRP, VRRP, and GLBP for a campus network with 50 VLANs. We have dual distribution switches and want optimal traffic distribution across both uplinks.
My OSPF network has 500 routers in a single flat area. CPU utilization is high and convergence takes 30+ seconds after a link failure. How should I redesign this?

sources_required: OSPF Anatomy of an Internet Routing Protocol

messages.content: We process credit card payments at 30 retail locations. What network segmentation is required for PCI-DSS compliance? Include the specific requirement sections.
Design QoS policy for a 100 Mbps WAN link that carries VoIP (50 calls), video conferencing, and business application traffic. What DSCP values and queuing strategy should I use?
Explain the difference between Route Distinguisher and Route Target in MPLS L3VPN. When would you use different RDs on the same PE router?
We have DMVPN Phase 3 with 150 branches. A WAN link has 5% packet loss but is not down. DMVPN traffic is still routing over it. How would SD-WAN handle this differently?
Design a VXLAN BGP EVPN fabric for a new data center with 40 leaf switches and 4 spine switches. We need Layer 3 routing between VLANs at the leaf layer. Which IRB mode should I use?

sources_required: Building Data Centers with VXLAN BGP EVPN

messages.content: We need 99.99% uptime for our data center network. Calculate the maximum allowed downtime per year and explain what N+1 vs N+2 redundancy means for this SLA.
What is the maximum number of servers a two-tier spine-leaf fabric can support using 64-port switches? What about 128-port switches?
When should I use BGP instead of OSPF as my campus IGP? We have a single building, 2000 users, and use Cisco equipment only.

sources_required: Choosing an IGP for Large-Scale Networks

messages.content: Design a DMZ architecture for a company that hosts web applications, an FTP server, and mail relay. External users must access these but cannot reach the internal corporate network.

sources_required: CVD Firewall and IPS Design Guide

messages.content: A customer wants to extend their MPLS VPN across two service providers in different countries. Compare Inter-AS Options A, B, and C. Which is most secure and which is most scalable?

expected_key_facts: Option A most secure back-to-back VRF

messages.content: A customer says their budget is $5M for a network redesign but won't tell you more requirements. As a CCDE-level architect, what questions do you ask first?
Two branches share the same ASN and are connected to the same service provider. Branch A's routes are being rejected by Branch B with the message 'AS path contains local AS'. How do you fix this?
What OSPF area type should I use for branch offices that only need internet access via a default route and have limited memory/CPU? Explain the LSA filtering for each option.

sources_required: OSPF Anatomy of an Internet Routing Protocol

messages.content: Should I use traffic shaping or policing at the WAN edge for outbound traffic? Our ISP enforces a 100 Mbps committed rate. Explain the difference and impact on TCP.
Why does VXLAN require an MTU increase? What is the VXLAN header overhead and what happens if jumbo frames are not configured on the underlay?

sources_required: Building Data Centers with VXLAN BGP EVPN

messages.content: Compare hub-and-spoke vs full-mesh WAN topology for 80 branch offices. Include the formula for link count and explain when partial mesh makes more sense.
A healthcare company needs to segment medical devices (IoT), EHR systems, administrative workstations, and patient WiFi. Design the VLAN/VRF segmentation with HIPAA requirements.
Explain the four planes of Cisco SD-WAN architecture. What does each plane do and which component handles application-aware routing?
BGP route dampening is causing route instability issues in our network. A /24 prefix keeps getting suppressed. Explain how dampening works and how to tune or disable it.
Design active-active data center redundancy for an e-commerce site with 99.99% uptime requirement. What capacity planning rule applies and how do you handle the failover?

sources_required: Designing for Cisco Network Service Architectures

messages.content: When should I choose spine-leaf over three-tier for a new data center deployment? What specific traffic characteristics and application requirements drive this decision?

sources_required: Building Data Centers with VXLAN BGP EVPN
